name: Behavioral Analysis Mod
effects: Reduce the difficulty of Speech tests by 1 (min. 0)
description: Behavioral Analysis Mod: Reduce the difficulty of Speech tests by 1 (min. 0)
longDescription: A robot modification module. Behavioral Analysis Mod: Reduce the difficulty of Speech tests by 1 (min. 0)

name: Diagnosis Mod
effects: Reduce the difficulty of Medicine tests by 1 (min. 0)
description: Diagnosis Mod: Reduce the difficulty of Medicine tests by 1 (min. 0)
longDescription: A robot modification module. Diagnosis Mod: Reduce the difficulty of Medicine tests by 1 (min. 0)

name: Hacking Module
effects: Reduces the difficulty of Science tests to hack into locked computer systems by 1 (min. 0)
description: Hacking Module: Reduces the difficulty of Science tests to hack into locked computer systems by 1 (min. 0)
longDescription: A robot modification module. Hacking Module: Reduces the difficulty of Science tests to hack into locked computer systems by 1 (min. 0)

name: Hazard Detection Mod
effects: Reduce the difficulty of Survival tests to detect and disable traps and similar hazards by 1 (min. 0)
description: Hazard Detection Mod: Reduce the difficulty of Survival tests to detect and disable traps and similar hazards by 1 (min. 0)
longDescription: A robot modification module. Hazard Detection Mod: Reduce the difficulty of Survival tests to detect and disable traps and similar hazards by 1 (min. 0)

name: Integral Boiler Mod
effects: Once per scene out of combat, turn 2 dirty waters into 1 purified water in ten minutes
description: Integral Boiler Mod: Once per scene out of combat, turn 2 dirty waters into 1 purified water in ten minutes
longDescription: A robot modification module. Integral Boiler Mod: Once per scene out of combat, turn 2 dirty waters into 1 purified water in ten minutes

name: Lockpick Module
effects: Reduce the difficulty of Lockpick tests by 1 (min. 0), Does not need bobby pins or other lockpicking tools
description: Lockpick Module: Reduce the difficulty of Lockpick tests by 1 (min. 0), Does not need bobby pins or other lockpicking tools
longDescription: A robot modification module. Lockpick Module: Reduce the difficulty of Lockpick tests by 1 (min. 0), Does not need bobby pins or other lockpicking tools

name: Radiation Coils
effects: Can turn on or off at the start of a turn. While on, all creatures within Reach suffer 3 CD Radiation damage at the end of the robot's turn
description: Radiation Coils: Can turn on or off at the start of a turn. While on, all creatures within Reach suffer 3 CD Radiation damage at the end of the robot's turn
longDescription: A robot modification module. Radiation Coils: Can turn on or off at the start of a turn. While on, all creatures within Reach suffer 3 CD Radiation damage at the end of the robot's turn

name: Recon Sensors
effects: Reduce difficulty of tests to detect hidden opponents by 1 (min. 0), Enemies visible to you who attempt to hide add +1 to the difficulty of their Sneak tests
description: Recon Sensors: Reduce difficulty of tests to detect hidden opponents by 1 (min. 0), Enemies visible to you who attempt to hide add +1 to the difficulty of their Sneak tests
longDescription: A robot modification module. Recon Sensors: Reduce difficulty of tests to detect hidden opponents by 1 (min. 0), Enemies visible to you who attempt to hide add +1 to the difficulty of their Sneak tests

name: Regeneration Field
effects: Outside of combat, allies regain 2 HP at the start of each scene you are present within
description: Regeneration Field: Outside of combat, allies regain 2 HP at the start of each scene you are present within
longDescription: A robot modification module. Regeneration Field: Outside of combat, allies regain 2 HP at the start of each scene you are present within

name: Resistance Field
effects: Allies within Close range receive +2 Physical damage resistance
description: Resistance Field: Allies within Close range receive +2 Physical damage resistance
longDescription: A robot modification module. Resistance Field: Allies within Close range receive +2 Physical damage resistance

name: Sensor Array
effects: Re-roll 1d20 on all PER tests, May attempt PER tests to detect things which cannot normally be detected by the naked eye, such as radiation
description: Sensor Array: Re-roll 1d20 on all PER tests, May attempt PER tests to detect things which cannot normally be detected by the naked eye, such as radiation
longDescription: A robot modification module. Sensor Array: Re-roll 1d20 on all PER tests, May attempt PER tests to detect things which cannot normally be detected by the naked eye, such as radiation

name: Stealth Field
effects: Allies within Close range may re-roll 1d20 on Stealth tests
description: Stealth Field: Allies within Close range may re-roll 1d20 on Stealth tests
longDescription: A robot modification module. Stealth Field: Allies within Close range may re-roll 1d20 on Stealth tests

name: Tesla Coils
effects: Can turn on or off at the start of a turn. While on, all enemies within Reach suffer 4 CD Piercing 1, Stun Energy damage at the end of the robot's turn
description: Tesla Coils: Can turn on or off at the start of a turn. While on, all enemies within Reach suffer 4 CD Piercing 1, Stun Energy damage at the end of the robot's turn
